admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.subtitle: Run every corner of CarbonTrack from one place

command.placeholder: Quickly jump or run an action
command.hint: Tip: Enter natural language commands above and the assistant will suggest context-aware actions.
command.aiHint: Press Enter or click send to let the AI guide navigation or actions
command.aiEmptyState: No conversations yet. Describe what you'd like to do.
command.aiErrorGeneric: Unable to fetch AI response. Please try again later.
command.aiMissingInfo: Please complete the required info and try again
command.aiFallbackReason: We couldn't extract a clear admin intent. Try a keyword search or be more specific.
command.searchUsersHint: Go to user management and focus the search field
command.createBadgeHint: Open badge management in create mode
command.sessionEmptyHint: No session selected yet. Type an instruction and let the admin AI query data, summarize findings, or prepare approvals.
command.historyLoadFailed: Failed to load AI session history
command.decisionFailed: Failed to process the proposal decision
command.aiEmptyMessage: The assistant returned no visible message

aiWorkspace.title: Keep governance, lookup, and execution review in one place
aiWorkspace.subtitle: Use one workspace to review sessions, summarize admin state, draft actions, and approve the operations that still need a decision.
aiWorkspace.unavailableDescription: You can still browse sessions, capabilities, and quick links. To restore chat, check the backend LLM configuration and diagnostics.
aiWorkspace.conversationsDescription: Keep titles, last messages, and recent activity together.
aiWorkspace.newConversationDescription: Describe the goal, target, and scope. The workspace will return results or a draft action plan.
aiWorkspace.shortcutsDescription: Jump straight to the relevant admin screen when you need a precise route.
aiWorkspace.conversationDescription: This session keeps messages, proposals, and recent activity available for follow-up work.
aiWorkspace.emptyDescription: Ask it to inspect logs, find users, summarize metrics, or prepare a draft action that you can confirm later.
aiWorkspace.composerHint: Press Ctrl/Cmd + Enter to send. For write actions, draft first and confirm second.
aiWorkspace.placeholderReady: For example: summarize the current pending admin work and rank it by priority.
aiWorkspace.placeholderUnavailable: AI is not configured yet. You can only review capabilities and history right now.
aiWorkspace.starterPromptsDescription: Pick a template and keep editing, or type your own request directly.
aiWorkspace.noStarterPrompts: No starter prompts are configured right now.
aiWorkspace.pendingDescription: Only proposals that are still waiting in the current session appear here.
aiWorkspace.pendingEmpty: No pending actions in this session.
aiWorkspace.pendingFallback: Waiting for an admin decision before execution.
aiWorkspace.capabilityDescription: This view is synced from the shared workspace configuration used by both frontend and backend.

passkeys.title: Passkey Overview
passkeys.description: Inspect registered passkeys across the platform and how they are being used.
passkeys.listDescription: Filter active passkeys by user, label, and recent usage.
passkeys.searchPlaceholder: Search by username, email, or passkey label
passkeys.empty: No passkeys match the current filters.

header.quickActionsHint: Use the command palette to access common tasks
header.pendingHint: Each module surfaces items waiting for attention
header.securityHint: Keep this console accessible to administrators only

footer.tip: Tip: press Ctrl + K to open the AI workspace

diagnostics.title: API Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Visualize the published OpenAPI contract, inspect endpoints, and verify request/response coverage.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Search and narrow down endpoints by method, tag, security requirements, or response codes.

status.errorDescription: The OpenAPI document could not be loaded. Check the configured URL or try again.
status.empty: No endpoints match the selected filters.

tester.title: Live request tester
tester.description: Send an on-demand request to validate status codes and payloads.

fields.authDescription: Attach the stored bearer token when available.

messages.pathParamRequired: Please provide a value for required parameter "{{name}}".
messages.bodyNotAllowed: This HTTP method does not accept a request body.
messages.invalidJsonObject: {{field}} must be a valid JSON object.

broadcast.title: Broadcast Center
broadcast.description: Send system messages to all or selected users

form.title: Title
form.contentFormatHtmlHint: HTML announcements are sanitized with the shared safety profile and keep only approved tags, links, and table structures.
form.contentFormatTextHint: Plain-text announcements are automatically rendered into paragraphs and line breaks.

format.textHint: Recommended for standard notices; the inbox will preserve paragraphs and line breaks.
format.profileHint: Current profile: announcement_html_v1 (supports headings, paragraphs, lists, code blocks, tables, and safe links).

editor.title: HTML template editor
editor.description: Use curated snippets and templates to author announcement HTML with fewer structural mistakes.
editor.placeholder: Write safe HTML announcement content here...
editor.shortcutHint: CodeMirror is enabled: HTML highlighting, bracket auto-close, and multi-line editing are available.
editor.embeddedAiDescription: Invoke AI directly from the editor—similar to a Copilot workflow—using the current title, content, and extra instruction.
editor.embeddedAiPlaceholder: For example: keep the current structure, make the tone more formal, emphasize the deadline, or add a short FAQ.
editor.embeddedAiHint: The AI reads the current title, priority, and editor content; the panel below still keeps prompt copy and preview tools.
editor.themeHint: 💡 {{theme}} theme is enabled. Press Ctrl + I to open the built-in AI Copilot assistant and rewrite selected fragments inline.

snippetContent.heading: Section title
snippetContent.quote: Place a key notice or emphasized message here.

maintenance.label: Maintenance notice
maintenance.description: Best for service windows, maintenance plans, and downtime alerts.
maintenance.content:
Scheduled Maintenance Notice

Dear users, we will perform a system upgrade on [date] [time].

Expected impact: [describe impact]

release.label: Release update
release.description: Best for feature launches, rule adjustments, and release notes.
release.content:
Release Update (v[version])

We have shipped a new version with the following highlights:

  • [New] Feature A
  • [Improved] Feature B

event.label: Event invitation
event.description: Best for campaigns, signups, seasonal events, and community calls to action.
event.content:
[Event name] registration is now open

We would love to have you join us.

Event time: [time]

Click here to register

copilot.instructionPlaceholder: Tell Copilot how to revise the content... (Press Enter to submit, Esc to cancel)
copilot.selectionHint: Selected fragment ({{count}} chars) - rewrite only this fragment
copilot.documentHint: Document mode - generate or rewrite the full announcement
copilot.reviewReady: AI content is ready. Review it and decide whether to keep it.

llmHelper.title: LLM-assisted announcement editing
llmHelper.copyPanelDescription: The embedded AI handles in-editor drafting; this area keeps the system prompt, user prompt, and full bundle ready for external models.
llmHelper.description: The built-in model can help with quick drafts; for stronger models, copy the system and user prompts into another AI provider.
llmHelper.builtinSuccess: Built-in AI generated an announcement draft.
llmHelper.builtinFailed: Built-in AI failed to generate a draft. Please try again.
llmHelper.builtinInputRequired: Provide a title, content, or extra instruction before generating.
llmHelper.actionHint: The copied user prompt updates automatically using the current title, priority, and editor content.
llmHelper.instructionPlaceholder: For example: emphasize the deadline, add an FAQ section, make the tone more formal, or target newly registered users.
llmHelper.instructionHint: This extra instruction is injected into both built-in generation and the copyable external prompt.
llmHelper.tipStep1: Choose a mode such as draft generation, rewrite, compression, or text-to-HTML conversion.
llmHelper.tipStep2: Copy the system prompt and user prompt into a stronger external model.
llmHelper.tipStep3: Paste the returned HTML back into this editor, then verify it with the Web and Email previews.

livePreview.title: Live dual preview
livePreview.description: As the admin edits content, preview both the inbox version and the email version side by side.

helper.customCount: {{count}} valid user IDs will receive this broadcast.

validation.general: Please fix the highlighted errors before continuing.
validation.targetsRequired: Provide at least one valid user ID.
